name: imsg
description: Local Messages.app access for Codex: list chats, read and search iMessage/SMS history, inspect sends, and approval-gated send or tapback reactions from this Mac.

interface.longDescription: Use local Messages.app data on this Mac to inspect recent chats, read and search iMessage/SMS history, check permissions, prepare send or tapback actions for review, and perform send/react operations only through explicit confirmation gates.
defaultPrompt: List recent Messages chats and summarize what needs attention
Search local iMessage/SMS history for a phrase or person
Read the latest messages in a specific chat
Prepare a Messages reply for review without sending
Check imsg permissions and explain what is missing
